name: Chicken and Sausage in Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large heavy skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and sauté until light golden brown.
3. Remove the garlic and set aside.
4. Prick the sausage links several times with a fork.
5. Sear the sausage in the hot oil, turning occasionally to ensure even browning on all sides. Remove and set aside, covered.
6. Brown the chicken legs and thighs well in the same skillet. Turn the heat off, then remove and set aside, covered.
7. Pour 1 tablespoon of drippings into a large Dutch oven or casserole dish.
8. Discard any remaining drippings (save for another use if desired).
9. Crush the tomatoes with your hands and add them to the sauce in the Dutch oven, along with their juice.
10. Add tomato paste, salt, pepper, dried basil, and reserved garlic. Stir well.
11. Simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
12. Add the sausage links and simmer, covered, for an additional 20 minutes.
13. Add the chicken pieces, cover, and simmer for another 20 minutes.
14. Deglaze the skillet with red wine by pouring it into the sauce in the Dutch oven.
15. Stir the wine into the sauce and let it simmer for a final 10 minutes.
16. Sprinkle chopped parsley over the dish before serving with pasta and freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
